verdict.rationale: MELK is a textbook discredited drug target. A 2017 CRISPR study (eLife) demonstrated no proliferation effect after MELK knockout in 13 cancer cell lines, directly contradicting 30+ prior publications. The sole clinical compound, OTSSP167, achieves its anti-proliferative effects through off-target kinase inhibition rather than MELK inhibition. Broad DepMap essentiality signals and no validated therapeutic window result in a safety_selectivity dimension score of 2.8/15.0 (18.7%), which violates the 20% minimum threshold. NO-GO verdict.
